hooks.command: cd /home/user/KoFEM && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings

input=$(cat); f=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in *.rs) cd /home/user/KoFEM && cargo fmt --all 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd web && [ -d node_modules ] && bun run typecheck || true ;; esac

input=$(cat); f=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in *kofem-mesh*.rs) cargo clippy -p kofem-mesh -- -D warnings 2>&1 | head -50 | jq -Rs 'if . != "" then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("Clippy (kofem-mesh):
" + .)}} else empty end' ;; *kofem-core*.rs) cargo clippy -p kofem-core -- -D warnings 2>&1 | head -50 | jq -Rs 'if . != "" then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("Clippy (kofem-core):
" + .)}} else empty end' ;; *kofem-geom*.rs) cargo clippy -p kofem-geom -- -D warnings 2>&1 | head -50 | jq -Rs 'if . != "" then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("Clippy (kofem-geom):
" + .)}} else empty end' ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true
